prerequisites: A Facebook (Meta) Ad Account whose numeric Ad Account ID you can supply in account_ids.
Permission to access the target ad account: on hosted/OAuth setups an admin must grant access; for token-based setups you need a Meta developer app with the Marketing API product enabled.
A Marketing API access token (or a Meta app's client_id and client_secret to drive the OAuth flow) carrying the ads_management, ads_read, business_management, and read_insights permissions.

authMethods.name: OAuth (credentials)
authMethods.summary: Authorize the connector against your Facebook account so it obtains an access token. This path uses the credentials object, where credentials.client_id and credentials.client_secret identify your Meta app and credentials.access_token holds the issued token. The authorizing user must have access to the ad account.

authMethods.name: Marketing API access token
authMethods.summary: Provide a Marketing API access token directly in the access_token field. Generate it in the Meta Developer Dashboard for an app with the Marketing API enabled, requesting the ads_management, ads_read, business_management, and read_insights permissions. client_id and client_secret of the Meta app may also be supplied to support token refresh.

setupSteps.title: Identify your ad account(s)
setupSteps.body: Collect the numeric Facebook Ad Account ID for each account you want to replicate and set them, comma-separated, in account_ids. This field is required.

setupSteps.title: Create a Meta app with the Marketing API (token-based setup)
setupSteps.body: Register as a Meta developer, create an app, and add the Marketing API product to it. This app provides the client_id and client_secret and is where you generate the access token.

setupSteps.title: Grant the required permissions
setupSteps.body: When generating the token, request the ads_management, ads_read, business_management, and read_insights permissions. For production-scale use, request Advanced Access for ads_read and ads_management through App Review with a verified Business Manager, since Standard Access tokens are heavily throttled.

setupSteps.title: Provide credentials to the connector
setupSteps.body: Either run the OAuth flow so the connector fills credentials.access_token using credentials.client_id and credentials.client_secret, or paste a Marketing API token directly into the access_token field.

setupSteps.title: Set the replication window and filters
setupSteps.body: Optionally set start_date and end_date to bound the sync (insight tables can only pull roughly the last 37 months), and adjust optional filters such as campaign_statuses, adset_statuses, ad_statuses, custom_insights, insights_lookback_window, and fetch_thumbnail_images.
